rationale: Educ. Code §26.007 governs parent access to school board meetings. The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no operative overlap with this provision.
quote: A parent is entitled to complete access to any meeting of the board of trustees of the school district, other than a closed meeting held in compliance with Subchapters D and E, Chapter 551, Government Code.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns school board meeting access, unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
